sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108708" key="u(polimw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπολῑμώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n108708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">somewhat hungry,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δεῖπνα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.643d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
